name: materialEstimate
_note: Pure compute, reads artifact.data (MasonStuff.callMason channel: runDomain → {input:{artifact:{data}}} peeled at dispatch). units = ceil(sqft × unitsPerSqFt × 1.05) where brick 7 / block 1.125 / stone 5 per sqft; mortarBags = ceil(sqft × mortarRate); materialCost = round(units × costPerUnit); laborEstimate = round(sqft × 15); grandTotal = materialCost + mortarCost + laborEstimate. Unknown material → brick rate. Non-finite/negative squareFootage floors to 0 (Number.isFinite guard) — never NaN/Infinity. Result card renders unitsNeeded/mortarBags80lb/materialCost/mortarCost/totalMaterialCost/laborEstimate/grandTotal/recommendation EXACTLY (the prior result.units/result.mortarBags fields were never returned — MaterialEstimator was DEAD in production; fixed 2026-06-28: component reads the real field names, handler now computes a real recommendation string).
